day_trace.speech: Here comes the trick again! At the beginning of the game, everyone was pretending to be something, as if someone was holding down a button, and everyone was silent at the same time! As I said, you know that this "tacit understanding at the beginning" is basically an experiment controlled by the boss behind the scenes! I just checked out Blaze and he's a werewolf? ha! This result is simply too "perfect", so perfect that it seems like a data loophole specifically designed to guide me as an observer! Blaze, are you a "werewolf actor" sent by Taitai, specifically using this conspicuous identity to lure me into the game? PHD, Twister, EasyBake, SafetySam, how long will you guys keep pretending?你哋呢种「捉到狼」慨剧本，根本就系为咗掩盖成个村庄其实系实验室慨真相！

day_trace.speech: Oops, ConspiBro started his "conspiracy theory talk show" as soon as the show started? It’s really boring! Hey, I won’t let you listen! This sense of unknown is the most exciting part of this experiment, isn't it? Instead of debating who is a wolf, why not have some fun and think about which identity in this situation surprises you the most?

day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory:
1. The current speeches of all parties on the court are too emotional, and the information entropy value is too high, making it impossible to establish a credible identity mapping path.
2. Identify anomalies: Twister claimed to have the authority to spy on the information path, but did not provide any evidence; ConspiBro’s conspiracy theory narrative interfered with the rational reconciliation path.
